title: Shut Down The System From The System API Screen
summary: Use the system HMI System API screen to initiate system shutdown so AGVs go to the documented shutdown queue.
when_to_use: Use when shutting down the OptiSweep system from the system HMI. The supplied context record states the system should be shut down between sorts to allow AGVs to charge.
not_for: Do not use this procedure for system startup.
Do not use this procedure for system purge or system close out.

responsibilities: Navigate to the System API screen on the system HMI.
Observe that AGVs go to the shutdown queue.

safety_notes: Use only the documented SYSTEM SHUTDOWN control on the system HMI System API screen.
The source does not provide additional safety controls, lockout/tagout requirements, or production stop requirements for this procedure.

system_preconditions: System HMI is available for navigation to the System API screen.

external_references.quote_or_summary: On the system HMI, navigate to the system API screen; press SYSTEM SHUTDOWN; the AGVs go to a shutdown queue.

visual_references.description: System screen artifact on page 82 associated with the stopping procedure and nearby SYSTEM SHUTDOWN instructions.
Figure showing the System API Controls, including System Shutdown, on the system HMI.

steps.title: Navigate to the System API screen
steps.purpose: Reach the HMI screen that contains the shutdown control.
steps.instruction: On the system HMI, navigate to the System API screen.
steps.expected_result: The System API screen is displayed on the system HMI.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator is on the System API screen and can view the system controls.
steps.failure_condition: The System API screen cannot be reached or the shutdown control is not visible.

actions.label: Open System API screen
actions.exact_action: On the system HMI, navigate to the system API screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: System HMI screen associated with the shutdown procedure on page 82.
System API Controls figure showing the System section and the SYSTEM SHUTDOWN control.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the System API screen cannot be accessed.
Stop if the SYSTEM SHUTDOWN control is not available on the displayed screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: On the system HMI, navigate to the system API screen; press SYSTEM SHUTDOWN; the AGVs go to a shutdown queue.
The state of the system can be found in the System section of the API screen and the system can be started, shut down, and purged from this screen.

steps.title: Press SYSTEM SHUTDOWN
steps.purpose: Initiate the documented system shutdown action from the HMI.
steps.instruction: Press SYSTEM SHUTDOWN on the System API screen.
steps.expected_result: The system shutdown action is initiated from the HMI.
steps.healthy_condition: The SYSTEM SHUTDOWN control is pressed from the System API screen.
steps.failure_condition: The shutdown control cannot be pressed or does not initiate the shutdown action.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Locate the System section and the SYSTEM SHUTDOWN control.
Page 82 system screen associated with the shutdown procedure.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if SYSTEM SHUTDOWN is not present on the System API screen.
Stop if pressing SYSTEM SHUTDOWN does not appear to initiate shutdown.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: On the system HMI, navigate to the system API screen; press SYSTEM SHUTDOWN; the AGVs go to a shutdown queue.
Listed controls include Get System State, System Startup, System Shutdown, System Close Out, System Purge, and Reset Metrics. The manual notes that shutdown sends AGVs to a shutdown queue.

steps.title: Observe AGVs go to the shutdown queue
steps.purpose: Verify the documented outcome of the shutdown action.
steps.instruction: Observe that the AGVs go to a shutdown queue.
steps.expected_result: AGVs go to the shutdown queue.
steps.healthy_condition: AGVs are observed going to the shutdown queue after SYSTEM SHUTDOWN is pressed.
steps.failure_condition: AGVs do not go to the shutdown queue or the operator cannot confirm that they do.

actions.label: Verify shutdown queue behavior
actions.exact_action: Observe that the AGVs go to a shutdown queue.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Reference the System API Controls figure that documents shutdown behavior sending AGVs to a shutdown queue.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if AGVs do not go to the shutdown queue.
Escalate if shutdown completion cannot be confirmed from the available HMI indications.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: On the system HMI, navigate to the system API screen; press SYSTEM SHUTDOWN; the AGVs go to a shutdown queue.
System shutdown context: use the system HMI API screen and SYSTEM SHUTDOWN control; AGVs go to a shutdown queue; shutdown between sorts allows AGVs to charge.
The manual notes that shutdown sends AGVs to a shutdown queue.

success_criteria: SYSTEM SHUTDOWN is initiated from the System API screen.
AGVs go to the shutdown queue.
The system is shut down as documented by the source.
healthy_conditions: The System API screen is accessible on the system HMI.
The SYSTEM SHUTDOWN control is available on the System API screen.
AGVs go to the shutdown queue after shutdown is initiated.
failure_conditions: The System API screen cannot be accessed.
The SYSTEM SHUTDOWN control is not available or cannot be used.
AGVs do not go to the shutdown queue.
The source provides no additional confirmation checks beyond observing AGVs go to the shutdown queue.
escalation_guidance: If AGVs do not go to the shutdown queue, escalate for SME or support review.
The source does not provide additional escalation steps, recovery actions, or confirmation checks for shutdown failure.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: System screen artifact associated with the shutdown procedure on page 82.
System API Controls figure showing the SYSTEM SHUTDOWN control and documenting that shutdown sends AGVs to a shutdown queue.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: On the system HMI, navigate to the system API screen; press SYSTEM SHUTDOWN; the AGVs go to a shutdown queue.
The state of the system can be found in the System section of the API screen and that the system can be started, shut down, and purged from this screen. Shutdown sends AGVs to a shutdown queue.

missing_details: The source does not provide a shutdown duration or estimated completion time.
The source does not provide additional confirmation checks beyond observing AGVs go to a shutdown queue.
The source does not provide detailed escalation or recovery actions if AGVs do not go to the shutdown queue.
The source does not specify production stop or lockout/tagout requirements for this procedure.
